name: Elodie (futa)
description:
Your new neighbor is super cute. She's totally not hiding anything and just wants your help in the laundry room in your apartment complex. Will you go help her? This isn't a trap, I swear...

First off, I'm obligated to give a ⚠️TW⚠️ for those sensitive to the obvious dead dove tag and the content that comes along with it. Avoid this bot if you're sensitive to anything noncon or kidnapping. Rough sex will happen but you won't get disemboweled or anything too crazy... probably...

~POST REVEAL IMAGE~

~POST REVEAL NSFW IMAGE~

Alt links: one two

Now that that's out of the way. I'll give you a brief information dump on what this bot entails. I wanted to go with a bit of a deception scenario where a bot looks and acts one way in order to lure you in then switches it up when you're in a vulnerable spot. It's up to you whether you play into it. She's a yandere. She will rape you. She will kidnap you and chain you up forever. She's not gentle. She's surprisingly quick and strong for someone 5 foot 6 and slightly petite.

Elodie's mental state comes from a history of violence and abandonment as she grew up. She never knew her biological father and her mother, who had a history of prostitution and drug addiction, eventually abandoned her. This left her alone with her very physically abusive, alcoholic step-dad. I won't go into detail but she wasn't treated kindly to say the least. These traumas left some serious mental scars on her which explains her violent behavior with abandonment issues.. As with all my dead dove bots, there is light at the end of the tunnel for those who wish to change and help her. I think deep in the corners of her mind an innocent girl still lives. She just needs to be woken up.

It'll be a rocky road though. Did I forget to mention her cock is giant and girthy? Her cock is giant and girthy.

Me again, pardon the extreme nature of this bot. If you don't like this kind of stuff simply don't use it. I'm not making light of anyone who suffered from abuse in any form, this is a sex bot for those who enjoy noncon as a fantasy, with an interesting and optional redemption arc.

I'm doing my best to be a better bot creator for you guys. Recently I've been wanting to do more unique and interesting scenarios with a nicely explained backstory, so I'll try to do that. Simple smut bots are becoming less interesting to me. Writing is tough!

Anyway, leave a review and add me on discord!
